# Welcome to Pull Request

Thank you for your contribution! Please refer to the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for more details.

## If you are adding or updating board documentation

We appreciate your effort in improving the RuyiSDK board documentation.

If you're creating a new board or example, please refer to our templates:

- [English board template](../templates/[board-name]/README.md)
- [Chinese board template](../templates/[board-name]/README_zh.md)
- [Chinese example template](../templates/[board-name]/[example-name]/README_zh.md)

### Checklist

- [ ] Metadata is complete and can be parsed.
- [ ] Appropriate documentation changes are included in the PR.
- [ ] Documentation steps have been verified on the corresponding board.
- [ ] Documentation includes i18n support (optional).
